subcodes.first_line: Verily, in the immersion of the All-Glorious One in the ocean of tribulation and His assumption of the garment of destiny there are signs for them that possess insight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان فی تغمس البهاء فی بحر البلاء و تقمصه قمیص القضاء لایات لاولی الابصار ان یا
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @hypocrisy, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @justice and wrath of God
